zero_slop_policy.statement: NO AI SLOP ALLOWED AT ALL - ZERO TOLERANCE TO SLOP AND HALLUCINATIONS
zero_slop_policy.strict_compliance: Mandatory. Every claim must be project-specific, evidence-backed, trace-linked, reviewer-challenged, and free of unsupported invention.
zero_slop_policy.missing_evidence_rule: If evidence is missing, mark it as an assumption, risk, open question, or failure.

generated_skill.name: wealthcom-fintech-ai-saas-greenfield-meta-skill
generated_skill.purpose: Compile a product-tailored, regulated-fintech-AI-SaaS-greenfield meta-skill for the Wealth.com clone run. This is NOT a generic generated factory; it encodes the archetype, surfaces, risks, methods, artifacts, testing, runtime gates, and refusal rules specific to this workload.
trigger_conditions: Run intent matches: 'regulated fintech AI SaaS greenfield with document intelligence + multi-tenant + scenario-driven calculation engine'.
Surface flags align with PRODUCT-TAILORING-WEALTHCOM-001 (code/UI/API/data/scenario, regulated, NOT brownfield, NOT production at v0).
refusal_rules: Refuse to use LLM for tax/estate calculations without deterministic-engine fallback (architectural ADR violation).
Refuse to emit execution-ready legal documents without attorney-of-record assignment (UPL boundary).
Refuse to accept any artifact lacking RALPH 5-loop record + ≥2 adversarial critics + 18 artifact-level checks + 15 per-critic-seat checks.
Refuse to accept any test class with placeholder evidence or template-as-proof.
Refuse to accept tenant-isolation claims without Postgres RLS test + connection-pool test + audit-log test.
Refuse to accept Ester extractor claims without holdout-corpus + transfer-test evidence.
Refuse documents-only completion for any code/UI/scenario/data surface.
Refuse to lower thresholds <96% per expert without owner-scoped waiver record.
Refuse to load real PII/PHI test data — synthetic only at v0.
Refuse to use registered wealth.com marks (Ester®, Family Office Suite™, EstateFlow™, Heritage Map, Plan for Every Tomorrow™); enforce brand substitution.
Refuse to inject any wealth.com noun into factory-reusable rubrics or templates (anti-overfit).
Refuse to proceed past stage-exit without Hawkeye conformance audit pass or owner-scoped waiver.
Refuse to mark a transition accepted without TPM Judge + Evidence Clerk + ≥3 specialist juror pass + Adversarial Prosecutor stand-down (or patch beads).

gates: Implementation Execution Record per slice with build + unit + integration evidence.
TDD red-green-refactor evidence for any tax/estate calc rule.
No docs-only completion.
Playwright WYSIWYG records with desktop + mobile screenshots.
Console + network clean (no errors).
Viewport + layout + a11y (WCAG 2.1 AA) checks.
Visual regression baseline + diffs.
Heritage Map / EstateFlow / Scenario comparison: visual snapshot + interaction test.
Contract tests against OpenAPI for every public endpoint.
Per-integration partner adapter contract tests (mocks + recorded golden responses).
Tenant-bypass attempt tests must be blocked.
Auth + IDOR + SSRF tests.
Postgres RLS tenant isolation tests.
Per-tenant KMS key isolation test.
Audit log immutability test.
Encryption at rest + in transit verification.
Synthetic data only at v0 — real-PII gate triggers human boundary approval.
DEFERRED at v0. If enabled: release plan, rollback, observability, runbook, incident path, outage drill, operator signoff.
Scenario test matrix covers GRAT, SLAT, ILIT, CLAT, Dynasty, Revocable, QPRT, IDGT, CRT/CRUT.
Holdout dataset for Ester extractor from public corpora (NOT PRD examples).
Transfer test on edge cases: multi-jurisdiction, blended family, non-US-citizen spouse, minor beneficiaries.
Negative scenarios: malformed document, unsupported jurisdiction, ambiguous beneficiary.
n/a (greenfield).

expert_panel.meta_meta_compiler_critic: System Theorist & Meta-Architecture Critic — protects attractor shape, anti-overfit, transferability, recursion control. Persona-contracted in ATTR-WEALTHCOM-001.
expert_panel.product_sdlc_tailoring_critic: Requirements & Governance Architect — protects standards tailoring, customer intent, approval mechanics. Persona-contracted in ATTR-WEALTHCOM-001.
expert_panel.testing_and_release_assurance_critic: Standards/Verification/Safety Critic — protects evidence discipline, testing rigor, residual-risk handling. Persona-contracted in ATTR-WEALTHCOM-001.
expert_panel.adversarial_generic_process_critic: Adversarial Generic-Process Critic — attempts to prove this generated meta-skill is too generic to be the actual workload's skill. Mandate: if any rule could be cut-and-pasted into a different workload (e.g., a healthcare app or e-commerce app) without modification, that rule is too generic. Findings flow back to df-feedback-learning.

acceptance.compile_time_pass_evidence: All compile-time outputs instantiated this commit: tailoring profile, sdlc matrix, judge/jury policy (forthcoming), tasks_md (forthcoming), kg seed (forthcoming), tpm/pert (forthcoming).
acceptance.runtime_instantiation_pass_evidence: Pending Hawkeye-Stage0 audit and checkpoint-#1 approval.
residual_risks: Anti-overfit critic has not yet adversarially attacked this contract; first attack scheduled at Hawkeye-Stage0.
Generated meta-skill scope ('regulated-fintech-AI-SaaS') may overfit if used for non-fintech AI SaaS. Transfer-test bead deferred but mandatory before run closure.
acceptance.certificate: PENDING — issued only after Hawkeye-Stage0 pass + checkpoint-#1 approval.
